title: Dragon Ball: The Magic Begins
original_title: 新七龍珠 神龍的傳說
overview: An unauthorized live-action adaptation of the Dragon Ball manga, it follows a band of misfit adventurers trying to stop King Horn and his goal to collect all seven Dragon Balls, and his wish of ultimate power.
